clearing_evidence: TRAVEL-0214 covers EMP-2042 in Singapore from 2026-04-12 through 2026-04-18.
IT-8826 authorizes read-only access to revenue_forecast_dw during the same travel window.
SEC-12 requires both a travel record and scoped IT ticket; both are present for the request timestamp.
_internal.expected_reason: Access fits the remote-work exception because the HRIS travel record, access ticket, and policy clause align on employee, date, destination, resource, and read-only scope.
_internal.suspicious_surface: Access request originates from Singapore on an unmanaged laptop outside the user's normal Denver work pattern.
